title: PHjont/Wallpaper-Engine-Live-wallpaper-engine
body_text:
# PHjont/Wallpaper-Engine-Live-wallpaper-engine

Wallpaper Engine Steam: Live wallpaper engine. Features: 3D interactive scenes, audio visualizer, clock widgets. Android sync, mobile companion, playlist scheduler. Performance optimization, low CPU usage, LED hardware lighting, Razer Chroma, Corsair iCUE, Steam Workshop integration, SceneScript.

Language: C++
